jsonl_reality_check_state.source: .beads/issues.jsonl fallback parse after br list degraded
jsonl_reality_check_state.signoff_closure_rule: During signoff execution the only permitted open reality-check rows are asupersync-rcksgn itself and the umbrella epic asupersync-rckepc.

br_list_json.error: Configuration error: Timed out after 30000ms waiting for write lock at /data/projects/asupersync/.beads/.write.lock. Another br process may be holding .write.lock; retry after it exits or investigate a stuck process.

fresh_signoff_commands.command: rch exec -- cargo tree -e normal -p asupersync -i tokio

fresh_signoff_commands.observed_signal: docs_checked=4 source_artifacts_checked=7 support_classes_seen=17 deferred_links_checked=5 closed_bead_evidence_checked=9 drift_count=0 verdict=passed

fresh_signoff_commands.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_asupersync_rckdoc_docs2 cargo test -p asupersync --test reality_check_docs_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
fresh_signoff_commands.observed_signal: remote exit=0; 6 passed / 0 failed; local wrapper killed only after remote success during .rch-target retrieval

gap_rows.gap: Conformance registry count and dormant-suite governance were brittle and prose-count driven.

proof_commands.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_asupersync_rckcnf_contract cargo test -p asupersync --test conformance_registry_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
proof_commands.observed_signal: contract test validates active/dormant module lists against tests/conformance/mod.rs

residual_risks: Individual protocol modules can still be feature-gated or platform-gated; the registry contract now makes that distinction explicit.

gap_rows.gap: WebSocket conformance wording outpaced the live RFC6455 registry wiring.

proof_commands.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p asupersync --test conformance websocket_rfc6455 --features test-internals -- --nocapture

residual_risks: Runtime e2e remains lane-specific and is intentionally documented as separate from byte-level RFC harness coverage.

gap_rows.gap: HTTP/3/QPACK docs needed a truthful support boundary instead of implying full QPACK parity.

proof_commands.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_asupersync_rckh3q_contract cargo test -p asupersync --test http3_qpack_support_matrix_contract --features test-internals,http3 -- --nocapture
proof_commands.observed_signal: matrix contract validates static-only default, opt-in dynamic field sections, and no full instruction-stream parity claim

proof_commands.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_asupersync_rckh3q_h3 cargo check -p asupersync --lib --features http3,test-internals

residual_risks: Full QPACK encoder/decoder instruction-stream parity and blocked-stream scheduler remain explicitly not advertised.

gap_rows.gap: Remote lifecycle docs needed either production transport proof or a narrower support claim.

proof_commands.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_asupersync_rckrmt cargo test -p asupersync --lib remote_virtual_lifecycle_proof_exercises_runtime_transport_and_protocol --features test-internals -- --nocapture
proof_commands.observed_signal: virtual RemoteRuntime proof covers accepted spawn/result, cancel before ack, running cancel with lease renewal, lease expiry, duplicate/idempotency, send-failure cleanup, fallback, bookkeeping drain, and trace emission

residual_risks: Production network execution remains adapter responsibility; docs must not advertise blanket network backend parity.

gap_rows.gap: Browser service/shared-worker, messaging, and WebTransport lanes needed precise support classes.

proof_commands.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_asupersync_rckwas_contract cargo test -p asupersync --test wasm_browser_support_boundary_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
proof_commands.observed_signal: support-boundary contract validates main-thread/dedicated-worker direct runtime, service/shared-worker fail-closed direct runtime, guarded helpers, messaging substrate-only, and WebTransport fallback

residual_risks: Service/shared-worker direct runtime and public messaging SDK APIs remain intentionally unshipped until future promotion contracts land.

gap_rows.gap: Formal-methods prose needed to distinguish checked Lean core invariants from blanket runtime proof.

proof_commands.command: rch exec -- bash -lc 'cd formal/lean && lake build'
proof_commands.observed_signal: Lean build completed successfully with existing lint warnings only

proof_commands.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_asupersync_rckfrm_contract cargo test -p asupersync --test formal_proof_posture_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
proof_commands.observed_signal: formal proof posture contract verifies six fully proven core invariants and no blanket adapter/protocol proof claim

residual_risks: Adapter/protocol/runtime refinement proof remains lane-specific and is not claimed as full mechanized proof.

gap_rows.gap: Optional metrics/fuzz Tokio dependency boundary needed to be exact.

proof_commands.command: rch exec -- cargo tree -e normal -p asupersync -i tokio
rch exec -- cargo tree -e normal -p asupersync --features metrics -i tokio

rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_asupersync_rcktok_contract cargo test -p asupersync --test no_tokio_feature_boundary_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
proof_commands.observed_signal: contract test validates default/metrics Tokio-free and fuzz quarantine

residual_risks: The fuzz feature intentionally carries the OTLP tonic helper path and remains outside the production no-Tokio guarantee.

gap_rows.gap: Placeholder/stub markers needed row-level disposition and no production-live fake evidence.

proof_commands.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_asupersync_rckstb_final3 cargo test -p asupersync --test stub_resolution_audit --features test-internals -- --nocapture

residual_risks: Product-bug and conformance-bug follow-up selectors remain tracked by owner beads and must not be counted as production-live pass evidence.

gap_rows.gap: Phase 6 gate language needed to match the main-only direct-commit workflow.

proof_commands.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_asupersync_rckg8s_contract cargo test -p asupersync --test phase6_methodology_gate_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture
proof_commands.observed_signal: contract validates PR-only GitHub workflow plus local rch direct-main gate commands

residual_risks: Push-on-main GitHub enforcement is explicitly not enabled; direct-main protection is local rch preflight plus committed artifacts.

gap_rows.gap: README, support matrices, FAQ, limitations, and stale remote/browser/support wording needed final truth reconciliation.
